title: Zoom on iPad for coaching
description: Set up a Zoom account on iPad to enable on-screen drawing and screen sharing during coaching calls with clients; configure annotations, test drawing tools, and ensure secure access.
full_idea: Remember I need to make a Zoom account for my iPad so that I can draw like I did with Anna on coaching calls and share my screen to my clients
source_text: Remember I need to make a Zoom account for my iPad so that I can draw like I did with Anna on coaching calls and share my screen to my clients
